description:
# Claude API Context Editing

Wire Claude's native context management features as a second defense layer. This lets Claude itself manage context when our compaction isn't enough.

## Phases
1. Wire providerOptions for context management
2. Server-side compaction safety net
title: [Epic] Claude API Context Editing
